description_long: This is a large, orange and black wheeled excavator with a telescopic boom and a front-mounted bucket attachment. The cab is enclosed with glass windows and is positioned on the left side of the vehicle, providing visibility and protection for the operator. The excavator features four large, rugged tires suitable for urban and construction environments, and the body displays visible wear and dirt, indicating heavy use. The boom is robust and extends forward, supporting a wide, slightly rusted bucket designed for scooping or lifting materials. The rear of the vehicle has a triangular reflective sign for safety, and the side panels are marked with the brand 'CASE' and the model number '721B'. The overall construction is primarily metal, with some rubber and glass components, and the design is optimized for maneuverability and heavy-duty tasks in urban settings.
description: A rugged, orange and black wheeled excavator with a telescopic boom and a wide front bucket, featuring an enclosed operator cab and visible CASE branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide bucket attachment, central boom, and large tires, with the cab partially visible behind the boom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the enclosed cab, CASE branding, telescopic boom, and the full length of the bucket and undercarriage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the triangular reflective sign, rear tires, and the back of the cab and boom.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the boom extended forward, bucket attachment, and the vehicle's rugged tires and side panels.
